entity.name: Zhang Bulim Industrial Pte. Ltd.
entity.taxElection: Singapore income tax; rental income from GoWell Singapore OpCo lease subject to IRAS; related-party lease reviewed annually under IRAS transfer-pricing guidelines (Section 34D ITA); market-rent benchmarking via third-party JTC industrial valuation required for SEC/auditor review in connection with U.S. public listing

owners.name: Zhang Xi
owners.notes: Ultimate beneficial owner; voting and economic control through Zhang Bulim Industrial Pte. Ltd.

owners.name: Zhang Family Trust (BVI)
owners.role: Trust beneficiary vehicle — non-voting economic interest
owners.notes: BVI trust vehicle; Maples Trust as registered trustee; beneficial interest passes to Zhang family beneficiaries

capitalContributions.notes: Acquisition equity at SGD 3.46M purchase price + BSD + legal costs; funded through Zhang Family Trust distribution; GoWell Singapore OpCo not a contributor
M&E upgrade and fit-out refresh to support GoWell HQ lease renewal 2025; expensed against PropCo retained earnings; recouped via rent adjustment

debtSummary.loanType: Commercial Property Mortgage — JTC Leasehold Strata Industrial
debtSummary.interestRate: 3M Compounded SORA + 1.35% (effective ~3.78% p.a. as at May 2026)
debtSummary.amortisation: 25-year amortisation schedule; quarterly principal + interest; no prepayment penalty after Year 3
debtSummary.covenants: DSCR ≥ 1.20x (tested semi-annually on trailing 12M GoWell lease income); LTV ≤ 60%; JTC Corporation prior written consent for any change of control or sub-tenancy; rental assignment in favour of DBS; no additional encumbrances without DBS consent
debtSummary.security: First legal mortgage over JTC leasehold strata title (Units #04-51/54, Bulim Lane 2); Deed of Assignment of Rental Income (GoWell Singapore OpCo lease); corporate guarantee from Zhang Bulim Industrial Pte. Ltd.
debtSummary.notes: Refinancing event required at DBS maturity 2028 and JTC leasehold expiry 2038; DSCR currently 1.72x based on GoWell OpCo rent SGD 361,680/yr; U.S. listing audit requires disclosure of related-party lease as material contract — PCAOB-standard documentation required

guaranteesObligations.notes: Full recourse corporate guarantee for DBS mortgage; no personal guarantee from Zhang Xi required given LTV profile and stable PropCo rental income covenant

JTC leasehold strata: any change of use, sub-tenancy, or PropCo change of control requires JTC prior written consent; embedded in DBS mortgage covenant; must be secured before any PropCo share transfer, refinancing, or U.S. listing-related restructuring

guaranteesObligations.type: Related-party lease — U.S. listing disclosure obligation
guaranteesObligations.notes: GoWell Singapore OpCo lease from Zhang Bulim Industrial PropCo is a material related-party transaction; must be disclosed in S-1/F-1 prospectus; rent level must be benchmarked to JTC industrial market rates via independent third-party valuation or JTC broker certificate; transfer-pricing policy document required under IRAS rules; PCAOB-standard lease documentation and board approval minutes required
